title: Boat Rental in Mekong Delta: Budget Guide for 2026
html:
Exploring the Mekong Delta by boat is possible from around 30 EUR for a shared tour, with private skippered charters starting at 150 EUR per day. The delta's intricate waterways and floating markets are best navigated from towns like My Tho or Ben Tre. BoatHire24 connects you with verified local operators for a hassle-free experience.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Mekong Delta?

Renting a boat in Mekong Delta ranges from 30 EUR for a shared tour to 800 EUR for a crewed luxury yacht per day. Shared wooden boat tours to the Cai Be floating market cost around 30, 50 EUR per person. A private half-day trip on a small motorboat for up to 8 guests starts at 100 EUR. Full-day catamaran charters for 12 guests cost from 400 EUR. For a crewed 15-metre Fairline or Azimut, budget 700, 800 EUR per day.

Where to set off in Mekong Delta

Most boat trips depart from My Tho, about 70 km southwest of Ho Chi Minh City, at the My Tho Port. Ben Tre town offers canal tours from the Ben Tre Pier. Further south, Can Tho's Ninh Kieu Port is the gateway to the Cai Rang floating market. For longer journeys, Chau Doc on the border with Cambodia provides access to the Bassac River.

Which boat to rent

Choosing the right boat depends on your group size and itinerary. Consider this list:

  1. Shared wooden boat, best for budget travellers on a group tour, up to 12 passengers, from 30 EUR per person.
  2. Small motorboat, ideal for couples or small families wanting a private half-day excursion, up to 6 guests, from 100 EUR.
  3. Catamaran, perfect for day trips with friends, spacious deck, up to 12 guests, from 400 EUR. For a detailed example, check the Fairline charter page.
  4. Crewed luxury motor yacht, suited for overnight adventures with full crew, up to 10 guests, from 700 EUR.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Mekong Delta?

Most boat rentals in Mekong Delta include a captain, so no licence is usually required for private charters. However, if you wish to drive yourself, some operators offer bareboat rental but require a valid international boating licence. The local authorities mandate a license for boats over 15 metres, but the operator will confirm exact requirements at booking.

For an authentic experience, time your trip early in the morning to catch the Cai Rang floating market before 8 a.m., when it is busiest and the light is best for photos.

At a glance

  • Price band: 30, 800 EUR per day
  • Peak months: October to February (dry season, light north-east wind)
  • Trip length: 2 hours to overnight
  • Capacity: up to 12 guests on most vessels
  • Currency: EUR
  • Licence: usually not required (captain included)

Boat rental in Mekong Delta for families and groups

Families and groups often choose a private small motorboat for flexibility, costing 100, 200 EUR for a half-day cruise. These boats can navigate narrow canals and stop at fruit orchards or coconut candy workshops. For larger groups, a catamaran provides stable comfort and space for up to 12 people on the Bassac River. You can find many skippered charters in Mekong Delta that suit your group size.

Questions about boat rental in Mekong Delta

Can I rent a boat for a day trip in Mekong Delta?

Yes, day trips are common and last from 4 to 8 hours, covering floating markets and village visits.

Is it safe to rent a boat in Mekong Delta?

Most boats are well maintained and include life jackets; operators are licensed and safety briefings are given.

What is the best time of year for boating in Mekong Delta?

The dry season from November to February offers the most comfortable conditions with calm water.

Can I rent a boat without a captain in Mekong Delta?

Some operators offer bareboat rentals for experienced boaters, but a captain is included in most charters for safety.

Planning your boat trip in 2026 is easy with the BoatHire24 marketplace, where you can compare prices and book directly with local operators. If you own a boat, you can also list your vessel and reach travellers worldwide. BoatHire24 makes boat rental transparent and straightforward across the Mekong Delta and beyond.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Mekong Delta and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
